calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Assigned for trial. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Leland Batara; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff Gregory Li appears with counsel, Joseph Sacramento, Esq.; no appearance by or for defendants. Gregory Li is sworn and examined in his own behalf. Plaintiff's Exhibits are admitted in evidence and withdrawn at the conclusion of the hearing: #1: Lease Agreement; #2: Amended 3-day Notice. The court awards judgment to the plaintiff, and against defendants, for restitution of the premises and forfeiture of the lease, plus total damages of $15,000.00 and costs, to be determined. Attorney fees, to be determined, are awarded only against defendant Hovath. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare a judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Continued To Sep-30-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Continued To Oct-15-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. No appearance by the defendant and the court took the matter off the settlement conference calendar. The request for jury trial was stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
